response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate) expertise — critical for this role. His Java exposure is mentioned only in passing alongside DLang and C++, with no demonstrated work on IDE tooling, build systems, or application server integration.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer infrastructure
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Lack of demonstrable deep JVM or enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling experience
No evidence of IDE internals, language server, or compiler-level work
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not Java ecosystem
